# NeoHaskell code map

Routing: pick capability IDs from this closed list (aliases bridge intent
vocabulary); for NEW code use the extension points. Full contract: codemap/README.md.

## Capabilities

| id | responsibility | owns | risk |
|---|---|---|---|
| `core-primitives` | The NeoHaskell prelude surface | `core/core/*.hs` |  |
| `traits` | The typeclass layer | `core/traits/*.hs` |  |
| `concurrency` | Concurrency primitives | `core/concurrency/*.hs` | вЪ° |
| `system` | OS interaction | `core/system/*.hs` |  |
| `http-client` | Outbound HTTP client (Http.get/post, request building, internal plumbing). NOT the server side | `core/http/**/*.hs`вА¶ | рЯФТ |
| `json` | Json encode/decode wrapper over Aeson. | `core/json/*.hs` |  |
| `schema` | Schema derivation | `core/schema/**` |  |
| `auth` | AuthN/AuthZ | `core/auth/**` | рЯФТ |
| `config` | Typed app configuration | `core/config/**` | рЯФТ |
| `language-tooling` | Language-adjacent tooling | `core/neoql/**`вА¶ |  |
| `event-store` | Append-only event log | `core/service/Service/EventStore/**`вА¶ | рЯФТ вЪ° |
| `commands` | Command side of CQRS | `core/service/Service/Command/**`вА¶ | вЪ° |
| `entities` | Entity reconstruction | `core/service/Service/Entity/**`вА¶ | вЪ° |
| `queries` | Read side of CQRS | `core/service/Service/Query/**`вА¶ | вЪ° |
| `http-transport` | Exposes commands/queries to the outside | `core/service/Service/Transport/**`вА¶ | рЯФТ |
| `integration-runtime` | Integration runtime | `core/service/Integration.hs`вА¶ |  |
| `file-upload` | File upload/download | `core/service/Service/FileUpload/**` | рЯФТ |
| `service-wiring` | Application orchestration | `core/service/Service/Application/**`вА¶ | рЯФТ |
| `service-th` | Template Haskell derivation | `core/service/Service/TH/**` |  |
| `postgres-infra` | Postgres infrastructure | `core/service/Service/Infra/**` | рЯФТ |
| `testlib` | Shared test machinery | `core/testlib/**` |  |
| `outbound-integrations` | Concrete outbound integrations | `integrations/**` | рЯФТ |
| `testbed` | Reference app + acceptance tests | `testbed/**` |  |
| `dev-pipeline` | The Continuous Generation pipeline itself | `scripts/**`вА¶ |  |
| `website` | Astro/Starlight docs site (monorepo dir, NOT a separate repo) | `website/**` |  |
| `installer` | Rust installer (neo-install binary). | `installer/**` |  |
| `ci-cd` | Build/CI/CD | `.github/workflows/*.yml`вА¶ |  |
| `governance-docs` | Plans, ADRs (docs/decisions/), agent guide, contributor guide. | `docs/**`вА¶ |  |

## Extension points (where NEW things go)

| kind | create | register | tests |
|---|---|---|---|
| `new-core-primitive` | `core/core/<Name>.hs` | `core/nhcore.cabal exposed-modules`, `core/core/Core.hs re-exports (if prelude-level)` | `core/test-core/<Name>Spec.hs` |
| `new-command-machinery` | `core/service/Service/Command/ or core/service/Service/CommandExecutor/` | `core/nhcore.cabal exposed-modules` | `core/testlib/Test/Service/Command/**` |
| `new-query-machinery` | `core/service/Service/Query/ or core/service/Service/QueryObjectStore/` | `core/nhcore.cabal exposed-modules` | `core/testlib/Test/Service/QueryObjectStore/**` |
| `new-transport-feature` | `core/service/Service/Transport/<Feature>.hs or core/service/Service/Transport/Web/<Feature>.hs` | `core/service/Service/Transport.hs`, `core/nhcore.cabal exposed-modules`, `core/service/Service/Application/Transports.hs wiring` | `core/test-service/ (register in Main.hs + other-modules)` |
| `new-outbound-integration` | `integrations/Integration/<Name>.hs facade + integrations/Integration/<Name>/{Request,Response,Internal}.hs` | `integrations/nhintegrations.cabal exposed-modules` | `integrations/test/Integration/<Name>Spec.hs` |
| `new-pipeline-asset` | `scripts/<verb-implementation> or .claude/hooks/ or .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` | `dev (verb вАФ MANDATORY, doctor-enforced)`, `.github/workflows/checks.yml if a CI gate` | `scripts/doctor self-checks` |
